title: espeletia × bogotensis
intro: Espeletia × bogotensis, also known as the Bogotense or Colombian Espinillo, is a hybrid species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, specifically a natural hybrid between Espeletia grandiflora and Espeletia killipiana. This plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Espeletia × bogotensis include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting potential antiviral and antibacterial activities. In traditional medicine, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in topical applications, such as creams and salves.
